hero.description: Experience the first AI that does not just answer - it cites. ICCP ingests, analyzes, and connects every document in your ecosystem with a verifiable trail of truth.

features.title: The operating layer for trusted enterprise knowledge.
features.description: Every answer, file, and workflow stays connected so business teams can move faster without losing governance.

instantIngestion.title: Instant Ingestion
instantIngestion.description: Drag and drop PDFs, Word docs, and spreadsheets. Our engine vectorizes content in milliseconds, ready for immediate querying.

contextualAwareness.title: Contextual Awareness
contextualAwareness.description: ICCP understands semantic relationships. It does not just keyword match; it understands intent behind complex queries.

verifiableCitations.title: Verifiable Citations
verifiableCitations.description: Every claim generated is backed by a clickable source link that takes teams directly to the supporting paragraph.

rag.description: Transforming your raw data into intelligent answers in milliseconds. Watch the flow from ingestion to generation.

ingest.title: Ingest
ingest.description: Connect your knowledge base. Documents slide into our secure ingestion engine where they are parsed and chunked.

process.title: Process
process.description: Vector Processing. Our neural AI indexes content and retrieves relevant context with high-dimensional precision.

answer.title: Answer
answer.description: Generative Output. The system synthesizes the retrieved data into a coherent, cited answer instantly via chat.
answer.assistantAnswer: RAG combines retrieval with generation to give accurate answers.

liveDemo.title: See the reasoning unfold.
liveDemo.description: Our AI synthesizes data across multiple files in real-time. Watch how it handles a complex query about Q3 performance.
liveDemo.question: Summarize the revenue impact from the new market expansion in Q3.
liveDemo.answerBefore: Based on the financial breakdown, revenue increased by
liveDemo.answerAfter: quarter-over-quarter. This growth is directly attributed to the expansion into the APAC region.

billing.title: Plans that scale with your teams.
billing.description: Connect directly to live billing plans from the backend. Start free, then upgrade when your knowledge operations grow.
billing.error: Failed to load billing plans. Please try again in a moment.

cta.title: Ready to centralize your intelligence?
cta.description: Join thousands of forward-thinking companies using ICCP to power decision making with verifiable data.
cta.footer: No credit card required for trial.
cta.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid work email address.
cta.submitSuccessDescription: Our team will contact you via email.
